concept: Could you design a game where the player is a time archaeologist who excavates moments from history by carefully removing layers of temporal sediment? Each dig site represents a significant historical event whose outcome changes based on how cleanly you extract key moments. Improper excavation causes temporal anomalies that manifest as hostile guardians trying to preserve the timeline. Equipment upgrades allow for more precise manipulation of the time-soil, revealing alternate histories beneath the accepted record. The ultimate discovery lies at the deepest layer of reality: the origin point of time itself.
